calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2002 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David H. Williams, Esq. of the PUBLIC INTEREST LAWYERS GROUP 510/647-1900 for Plaintiff MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION moving party
Rachael Elaine Salcido, Esq. of PILLSBURY WINTHROP LLP 983-1813 for defendant HOME DEPOT U.S.A., INC. opposing party

This matter was on calendar under the wrong case number (317265) as Mr. Williams filed his moving papers in the wrong case. It should have been filed in this action. MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL vs. HOME DEPOT U.S.A. INC. The Court allowed argument on the motion. Matter argued and the Court granted the motion and approved the settlement as not being in violation of public policy. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. The wrong case file (317265) was released to the custody of Mr. Williams and he was directed to contact the supervisor of the Court's Filing Division, Room 103, to effect the correct computer entries and to move the papers to the correct case file. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
